name: María López
pain_point: slow lead qualification and fragmented follow-up across distributors
automation_angle: AI agent for distributor lead qualification, routing, and personalized outreach
email_body:
Hi María,

In companies like Seguritech LATAM, distributor-based sales cycles often introduce delays in lead qualification, especially when routing depends on manual coordination across partners.

One approach we’ve seen work well is layering an AI agent that qualifies and routes leads instantly based on context, ensuring distributors act while intent is still high.

Given your role in commercial strategy, this could help tighten response times without adding operational complexity.

Would it make sense to share a quick example tailored to your current distributor workflow?

Best,  
Leonel

name: Juan Pérez
pain_point: manual campaign execution and poor visibility into conversion bottlenecks
automation_angle: AI workflows for campaign personalization and follow-up automation
email_body:
Hi Juan,

In retail operations, campaign execution often becomes fragmented across channels, making it difficult to pinpoint where conversion drops actually occur.

A practical approach is to introduce AI-driven workflows that track and adapt follow-ups dynamically, giving clearer visibility into bottlenecks without adding reporting overhead.

From an operations perspective, this can help you prioritize what actually drives conversion rather than scaling campaigns blindly.

Would you be open to seeing a short example applied to a retail use case?

Best,  
Leonel

email_body:

A practical approach is to implement AI-driven lead triage that prioritizes and personalizes first-touch messaging based on intent signals.

At the CEO level, this can help maintain conversion quality without needing to expand the team too early.

Would it be useful to share a quick example tailored to fintech workflows?

Best,  
Leonel
